about.heading: About Golden Gear Automotive
body: At Golden Gear Automotive, our family-owned and operated auto repair shop, we pride ourselves on servicing a diverse range of vehicles, ensuring every customer’s car receives the expert attention it deserves. From everyday drivers to luxury imports and high-performance vehicles, our ASE Blue Seal Certified technicians have the skills and tools to work on all makes and models. Whether you drive a Toyota, Honda, or Ford, our team delivers reliable repairs and maintenance tailored specifically to your vehicle.

services.title: Diagnostics
services.description: Computerized diagnostics to pinpoint the problem before any work begins — no guesswork, no surprise charges.

services.title: Brakes & suspension
services.description: Brake service, shocks, and suspension repair to keep your vehicle stopping and handling safely.

services.title: Oil & maintenance
services.description: Oil changes and factory-scheduled maintenance that keep every make and model running reliably.

services.title: Engine repair
services.description: Engine diagnostics and repair by ASE Blue Seal Certified technicians — from check-engine lights to major work.

items.a: Hours can vary — give us a call at (707) 329-6105 and we'll let you know when we're open.
We proudly serve Sebastopol, CA and the surrounding community.

items.q: How do I get in touch?
items.a: Call us at (707) 329-6105 — we're glad to help.
